episodes.title: Ep 138: Surviving a cult, turning it into a #1 book, & the art of story telling w/ Lilia Tarawa
episodes.description:
In this episode I am joined with special guest Lilia Tarawa a #1 bestselling author, TEDx speaker with 12+ million views, and a leading personal brand strategist for ambitious business owners.

We dive into:

- Lilia's incredible journey and story of being born into a cult, leaving at 18 and being a 7 figure biz owner by  

- How she began to reclaim her voice, identity and power to create a life of her own.

- Why storytelling is an art and when done correctly there is no limits on how big your brand can be

-Biggest mistakes entrepreneurs are making with personal branding on IG

- How to remain authentic with AI and chatgpt with your messaging and content!

Connect with Tanya on IG: https://www.instagram.com/thetanyajane/
Connect with Lilia on IG: https://www.instagram.com/liliatarawa/

Get Lilia's book here: https://www.amazon.com/Daughter-Gloriavale-Life-Religious-Cult-ebook/dp/B07KCLFDL4

listen to Lilia's ted talk here: https://youtu.be/qS7mBbXxJYA?si=fLIvEuU2-y79q-dO
